subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Bear thou witness that verily there is no God but Him. His is all creation and command, and all were created by His bidding, and all are His [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا مهدی فاشهد بانه لا اله الا هو له الخلق و الامر و کل خلقوا بامره و کل له
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
